zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Assheton於1377年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾艾希頓 武安德 林時，她的父親Sir John de Ashton II37歲，母親Lady Anne de Standish29歲。她於1395年與Roger of Jerdez Wayle Jodrell Esquire結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1443年4月在英國英格蘭爾布拉哈爾享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Assheton was born in 1377, in Ashton Under Lyne, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John de Ashton II, was 37 and her mother, Lady Anne de Standish, was 29. She married Roger of Jerdez Wayle Jodrell Esquire in 1395. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in April 1443, in Bramhall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

Elle a épousé Roger of Jerdez Wayle Jodrell Esquire en 1395. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en avril 1443, à Bramhall, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

ko.Ashton Under Lyne, Lancashire, , England: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애슈턴 운더 리니
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Assheton(이)가 1377년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애슈턴 운더 리니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Ashton II(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne de Standish(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1395년 Roger of Jerdez Wayle Jodrell Esquire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1443년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브램홀에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Ashton Under Lyne, Lancashire, , England: аштон ундир лин, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Assheton родилась в 1377 г. в местности аштон ундир лин, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John de Ashton II было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne de Standish, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger of Jerdez Wayle Jodrell Esquire в 1395 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла апрель 1443 г. в местности брамхолл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.
